## What & why

<!-- what does this change, and why -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` and `npm run lint:styles` pass
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` (+ `:tests` / `:scripts`) pass
- [ ] `npm run test` and `npm run test:nuxt` pass
- [ ] `npm run generate` succeeds and `.output/public/_nuxt` exists
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` passes (and `npm run test:relay` if the relay changed)
